fields.purpose: DCOIR-specific OpenAI project identifier environment variable for API tools that need to send the OpenAI-Project header or otherwise bind requests to the DCOIR API project. Store only the environment variable name here; do not store the project id value unless explicitly approved.
fields.notes: Normalized 2026-05-03 under explicit safety-control contract. Project identifier value is protected by default; store only the environment variable name and safe runtime reference. Generated code may test presence/use the value for project scoping but must not hard-code, print, log, package, or echo it unless a future operator-approved non-secret display exception is recorded.

fields.purpose: Classic GitHub token environment variable for DCOIR operator tools that call GitHub API or CLI locally. Store only the environment variable name here; never store the token value.
fields.notes: Normalized 2026-05-03 for generated code/codeblock safety. Token value is sensitive; generated code must only test presence/use the value and must never print, log, package, or echo it.

fields.purpose: Airtable base identifier for the DCOIR workspace. Use this in generated scripts instead of hard-coding or asking the operator for the base id again.
fields.notes: Normalized 2026-05-03 for generated code/codeblock safety. Use the registered environment variable reference; do not hard-code the value. Generated code should fail fast if missing and should not print the configured value unless explicitly safe and needed.

fields.purpose: Local configuration directory for DCOIR operator-run scripts and generated helper packages. Use this to find or place local config files when a package needs durable workstation-side configuration.
fields.reference_additional_runtimes_json: {"javascript":"process.env.DCOIR_CONFIG_DIR","node_js":"process.env.DCOIR_CONFIG_DIR","typescript":"process.env.DCOIR_CONFIG_DIR","rust":"std::env::var(\"DCOIR_CONFIG_DIR\")","go":"os.Getenv(\"DCOIR_CONFIG_DIR\")","dotnet_csharp":"Environment.GetEnvironmentVariable(\"DCOIR_CONFIG_DIR\")","java":"System.getenv(\"DCOIR_CONFIG_DIR\")","ruby":"ENV[\"DCOIR_CONFIG_DIR\"]","php":"getenv(\"DCOIR_CONFIG_DIR\")","r":"Sys.getenv(\"DCOIR_CONFIG_DIR\")","vba":"Environ$(\"DCOIR_CONFIG_DIR\")","docker_cli_mount":"mount this variable into /config","container_path":"/config","wsl_bridge":"$DCOIR_CONFIG_DIR after export from Windows"}
fields.notes: Normalized 2026-05-03 for generated code/codeblock safety. Use the registered environment variable reference; generated code should fail fast if missing.

fields.purpose: DCOIR-specific OpenAI API key environment variable for project-owned operator tools and smoke tests. Store only the environment variable name here; never store the key value.
fields.notes: Normalized 2026-05-03 for generated code/codeblock safety. API key value is sensitive; generated code must only test presence/use the value and must never print, log, package, or echo it.

fields.purpose: Fine-grained GitHub token environment variable for DCOIR operator tools that call GitHub API or CLI locally. Store only the environment variable name here; never store the token value.
fields.notes: Normalized 2026-05-03 for generated code/codeblock safety. Token value is sensitive; generated code must only test presence/use the value and must never print, log, package, or echo it.

fields.purpose: Local Airtable access variable for operator-run DCOIR scripts. Generated scripts should read this variable from the Windows environment and must not show the value.
fields.notes: Normalized 2026-05-03 for generated code/codeblock safety. Token value is sensitive; generated code must only test presence/use the value and must never print, log, package, or echo it.

fields.purpose: Local directory for operator-facing output files generated by DCOIR commands, scripts, debug captures, terminal logs, and upload-ready evidence. Future instructions should prefer this variable for downloadable/uploadable outputs instead of writing into the repo root.
fields.reference_additional_runtimes_json: {"javascript":"process.env.DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR","node_js":"process.env.DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR","typescript":"process.env.DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR","rust":"std::env::var(\"DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR\")","go":"os.Getenv(\"DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR\")","dotnet_csharp":"Environment.GetEnvironmentVariable(\"DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR\")","java":"System.getenv(\"DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR\")","ruby":"ENV[\"DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR\"]","php":"getenv(\"DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR\")","r":"Sys.getenv(\"DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR\")","vba":"Environ$(\"DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR\")","docker_cli_mount":"mount this variable into /out","container_path":"/out","wsl_bridge":"$DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR after export from Windows"}
fields.notes: Normalized 2026-05-03 for generated code/codeblock safety. Use the registered environment variable reference for operator-facing outputs/logs; generated code should fail fast if missing.

fields.purpose: Local filesystem path to the operator's DCOIR GitHub repository working tree. Use this in generated scripts before asking for a repo path or hard-coding a local path.
fields.reference_additional_runtimes_json: {"javascript":"process.env.DCOIR_REPO_ROOT","node_js":"process.env.DCOIR_REPO_ROOT","typescript":"process.env.DCOIR_REPO_ROOT","rust":"std::env::var(\"DCOIR_REPO_ROOT\")","go":"os.Getenv(\"DCOIR_REPO_ROOT\")","dotnet_csharp":"Environment.GetEnvironmentVariable(\"DCOIR_REPO_ROOT\")","java":"System.getenv(\"DCOIR_REPO_ROOT\")","ruby":"ENV[\"DCOIR_REPO_ROOT\"]","php":"getenv(\"DCOIR_REPO_ROOT\")","r":"Sys.getenv(\"DCOIR_REPO_ROOT\")","vba":"Environ$(\"DCOIR_REPO_ROOT\")","docker_cli_mount":"mount this variable into /repo","container_path":"/repo","wsl_bridge":"$DCOIR_REPO_ROOT after export from Windows"}
fields.notes: Normalized 2026-05-03 for generated code/codeblock safety. Use the registered environment variable reference for repo-local operations; generated code should fail fast if missing.
